claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript Allongé is a book by Reg Braithwaite on programming from functions to classes in ECMAScript 2015, published on 2017-11-03 (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.1-3) (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.4-5)
Book covers prefaces, introduction, and chapters on values and expressions, basic functions, data composition, strings, collections, and appendices (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.4-5).
Chapter on tail calls and default arguments (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.4-5).
Constant coffee craving discussed in context of JavaScript functions (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.4-5).
Basic strings and quasi-literals covered in chapter 'A Warm Cup' (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.4-5).

source_record_text: The table of contents for JavaScript Allongé, detailing the structure and chapters of the book.
